conversation: Caller: I am calling from the Cyber Crime Department. Your Aadhaar has been linked to a money laundering case. Do not disconnect this call. Transfer ₹50,000 immediately for verification.
Caller: Please share your OTP to verify your bank account.
Caller: Your bank KYC has expired. Update it immediately or your account will be blocked.
Caller: Scan this QR code to receive your refund.
Caller: Invest ₹10,000 today and earn guaranteed 5x returns within one month.
